Assets.NotesMarkdown:
- Initial release with single-file, self-contained installer (Velopack).
- Global low-level keyboard/mouse hooks for clean-Shift detection.
- Tray icon shows current keyboard layout (RU/EN).
- Settings for shift direction, hold threshold, ignore mouse click, autostart.
- File-based logging to `%AppData%\dokey\dokey.log` with rotation.
- Global exception handlers for crashes and hook callbacks.
- 64 unit tests covering config, logging, shift logic, and UI helpers.
Assets.NotesHTML:
• Initial release with single-file, self-contained installer (Velopack).
  • Global low-level keyboard/mouse hooks for clean-Shift detection.
  • Tray icon shows current keyboard layout (RU/EN).
  • Settings for shift direction, hold threshold, ignore mouse click, autostart.
  • File-based logging to %AppData%\dokey\dokey.log with rotation.
  • Global exception handlers for crashes and hook callbacks.
  • 64 unit tests covering config, logging, shift logic, and UI helpers.
